name: Antirot
description: Strict coach accountability system with deterministic state, reminders, and behavioral memory.

workspaceDir.label: Antirot Workspace Directory
workspaceDir.help: Directory where Antirot writes longterm.md, shortterm.md, tasks.md, work.md, and .antirot state files.

openclawCommand.label: OpenClaw CLI Command
openclawCommand.help: Command used for best-effort cron scheduling. Defaults to openclaw.

alarmCommand.label: Loud Alarm Command
alarmCommand.help: Optional local shell command for maximum-intensity alarm playback.

normalAlarmCommand.label: Normal Alarm Command
normalAlarmCommand.help: Optional local shell command for normal wake alarm playback before loud escalation.

enableCron.label: Enable Cron Scheduling
enableCron.help: When true, Antirot tools attempt to schedule reminders through OpenClaw cron.

bestStrategiesCount.label: Best Strategies Count
bestStrategiesCount.help: Number of top-performing behavioral strategies to inject daily.

randomStrategiesCount.label: Random Strategies Count
randomStrategiesCount.help: Number of random/exploratory behavioral strategies to inject daily.
